posture.rule: No feature is complete until a live user workflow has UI, API, realtime, permissions, mobile, Playwright/API evidence, and Emma Bot dogfooding where applicable.

status_legend.proven: Complete end-to-end, dogfooded, tested, and evidence attached.
status_legend.partial: Meaningful workflow exists but is incomplete or missing polish, permissions, realtime, mobile, or tests.
status_legend.shallow_needs_proof: Schema, route, store, or UI exists, but the full workflow has not been proven.

evidence_sources.note: Master TODO plan with hard proof criteria.
Public Playwright QA found mobile horizontal overflow and invite route module loading errors.
Legacy task list marks many Discord-like features complete; those claims need re-audit.

github_issues.title: Milestone -1: brutal audit and claim demotion
Fix public QA failures and overclaimed landing copy
Messaging parity: prove and complete daily chat workflows
Roles and permissions parity: effective permissions, hierarchy, overwrites
Apps, slash commands, bots, and webhooks parity

areas.name: Marketing and Product Claims
observed: Landing page and metadata currently use feature-complete language.
Public QA captured mobile horizontal overflow on public routes.
Public QA captured dynamic module MIME errors for an invalid invite route.
gaps: Public unauthenticated routes are not clean across tested viewports.
Invite preview/error route is not production-polished.
next_todos: Replace feature-complete claims with in-progress parity language.
Fix mobile horizontal overflow on public pages.
Fix invite route asset loading for nested SPA routes.
Add no-overclaim check to QA.
proof_required: Playwright screenshots for mobile/tablet/desktop public pages
No console/page errors on invite routes

areas.name: Messaging
observed: Message routes, stores, MessageList, MessageInput, replies, reactions, pins, attachments, search, link preview, and thread UI names exist.
gaps: Discord-grade message context actions are not proven.
Jump-to-message, grouping, date separators, local drafts, upload progress, mention behavior, and permission denial UX need proof or implementation.
Realtime multi-client behavior needs regression coverage.
next_todos: Add Playwright chat suite for send/edit/delete/reply/react/pin/upload.
Implement or prove message grouping and jump-to-message.
Add denied SEND_MESSAGES and VIEW_CHANNEL tests.
Add Emma Bot chat script.

areas.name: Roles, Permissions, and Channel Overrides
observed: Role routes, permission bit definitions, channel override routes, RoleManager, RolePermissionsTab, and ChannelPermissionsTab names exist.
Several backend routes call server or channel permission checks.
gaps: Effective permission inspector is not proven.
Discord overwrite resolution behavior needs direct comparison tests.
UI may expose role/override surfaces without proving end-to-end enforcement.
next_todos: Build effective permission report per user/channel.
Add test matrix for owner/admin/mod/member/muted/banned users.
Add Playwright role and private channel workflow.
Audit every route for required permission.

areas.name: Onboarding and Server Guide
observed: Onboarding API, modal, and server guide surface names exist.
A missing server_onboarding table was recently repaired manually on production.
gaps: Default channel selection, questions, role/channel assignment, resource pages, rules screening, and audit trail are not proven.
Migration integrity must catch missing table drift automatically.
next_todos: Add migration/table integrity smoke test.
Implement invite-to-onboarding-to-channel Playwright flow.
Add onboarding question role/channel assignment.
Add Emma Bot onboarding script.

areas.name: Voice, Video, and Stage
observed: LiveKit, voice state, device settings, video grid, recordings, soundboard, and stage panel names exist.
gaps: Two-client join/leave/mute/deafen/screen-share workflow is not proven.
Server mute/deafen, stage speaker lifecycle, RTC reconnect, and mobile controls need proof.
LiveKit operational health is not in parity reporting.
next_todos: Add LiveKit health check to instance report.
Create two-client voice Playwright/manual checklist.
Prove stage audience-to-speaker flow.
Add voice permission denial tests.

areas.name: Apps, Bots, Slash Commands, and Webhooks
observed: Webhook routes and manager names exist.
gaps: Discord-like interaction response lifecycle is not proven.
Buttons, modals, context commands, permission-scoped installs, and bot management need implementation or proof.
Emma Bot integration path is not documented yet.
next_todos: Define Emma Bot account/token strategy.
Add slash command execution and response proof.
Add webhook create/execute/delete Playwright/API tests.
Design app install and authorized apps surfaces.

areas.name: Friends and DMs
observed: Friends routes/stores/page and DM channel schema/routes names exist.
gaps: Group DMs, calls, message requests, blocked users UX, mutual servers/friends, and per-DM notification overrides are not proven.
Privacy semantics and spam boundaries need tests.
next_todos: Add friends request/accept/block Playwright suite.
Prove one-to-one DM send/realtime flow.
Design group DM model and UI.
Add message request/spam inbox plan.

next_session_focus: Turn this report into GitHub issues or a project board.
Fix public overclaims and invite route errors.
Start the Playwright parity harness for messaging and roles.
Document Emma Bot credentials and test protocol without exposing secrets.
